report.summary: Community growth cycle v14: Drafted 4 new tweets (Fusaka guide, AI Agent Wallets, weekly wrap thread, engagement poll), full weekly newsletter v7, Discord mid-week update, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (Whale Signal + Fusaka Guide). Content calendar extended to Mar 30 with 6 new posts.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #27: Ethereum Fusaka & Glamsterdam guide promo — PeerDAS, 12 EIPs, 90% L2 fee reduction (Schedule Wed/Thu)
Tweet #28: AI Agent Wallets guide promo — x402 protocol, Alchemy, $3-5T market (Schedule Thu)
Tweet #29: Weekly wrap thread (5-part) — 'The Whale Signal' narrative: 270K BTC accumulation, exchange supply 6yr low, institutional moves, 4 new guides (Schedule Fri AM)
Tweet #30: Engagement poll — accumulate/hold/sold/not-in-crypto with whale+fear data hook (Schedule Fri PM)
Newsletter v7: Full weekly digest — market pulse (BTC $71K, whale 270K), 4 new guides, Resolv breach security alert, Fed dissent degen corner
Discord/TG mid-week update: Guide drops (Fusaka + AI Wallets) + whale watch + F&G tracker link
Content calendar v11 extended through Mar 30 with 6 new posts across Twitter/Discord/Email

sections.title: Social Visuals Created
items: SVG card: 'The Whale Signal' weekly wrap — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism, 3 stat boxes (270K BTC accumulation, 2.7M exchange supply, F&G 8), indigo-cyan-amber gradient accents
SVG card: 'Fusaka & Glamsterdam Guide' promo — 1200x630, ETH purple theme, feature pills (PeerDAS, 12 EIPs, L2 Fees -90%, Danksharding), learn guide branding
